description: 5 pack of high leg stretch cotton panties. Soft elasticated waistband with scalloped edge and pretty satin bow to the front. made from soft stretch cotton jersey, which is comfortable, light, and breathable, but stretchy and supportive. Fabric contains cotton for all-day freshness and elastane for comfort and fit. OEKO-TEX 100 certified as free from harmful substances – perfect for sensitive skin. The supportive nature of the stretch fabric makes these sets ideal for everyday wear. Reinforced gusset for extra security. Available in UK sizes 8 (to fit hips 92cm/36”), 10 (to fit hips 97cm/38”), 12 (to fit hips 100cm/39 1/2”), 14 (to fit hips 104cm/41”), 16 (to fit hips 109cm/43”), 18 (to fit hips 114cm/45”). Made from 95% Cotton, 5% Elastane, excluding trimmings. Grey Marl – 60% Cotton, 35% Polyester, 5% Elastane. Machine washable.
